'''âb-r-d-th''' ('''kabardethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monoubiquitinate|monoubiquitinate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-r-d-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monoubiquitinate|monoubiquitinate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-r-d-th
|-
! Lemma
| kabardethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibardethoko|thibardethoko]] || [[word:jibardethoko|jibardethoko]] || [[word:shibardethoko|shibardethoko]] || [[word:kibardethoko|kibardethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubardethoko|thuthubardethoko]] || [[word:jujubardethoko|jujubardethoko]] || [[word:shushubardethoko|shushubardethoko]] || [[word:kukubardethoko|kukubardethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubardethoko|thubardethoko]] || [[word:jubardethoko|jubardethoko]] || [[word:shubardethoko|shubardethoko]] || [[word:kubardethoko|kubardethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubardethoko|thubardethoko]] || [[word:jubardethoko|jubardethoko]] || [[word:shubardethoko|shubardethoko]] || [[word:kubardethoko|kubardethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebardethoko|thebardethoko]] || [[word:jebardethoko|jebardethoko]] || [[word:shebardethoko|shebardethoko]] || [[word:kebardethoko|kebardethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobardethoko|thothobardethoko]] || [[word:jojobardethoko|jojobardethoko]] || [[word:shoshobardethoko|shoshobardethoko]] || [[word:kokobardethoko|kokobardethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobardethoko|thobardethoko]] || [[word:jobardethoko|jobardethoko]] || [[word:shobardethoko|shobardethoko]] || [[word:kobardethoko|kobardethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobardethoko|thobardethoko]] || [[word:jobardethoko|jobardethoko]] || [[word:shobardethoko|shobardethoko]] || [[word:kobardethoko|kobardethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbardethoko|thĂŠbardethoko]] || [[word:jĂŠbardethoko|jĂŠbardethoko]] || [[word:shĂŠbardethoko|shĂŠbardethoko]] || [[word:kĂŠbardethoko|kĂŠbardethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabardethoko|thathabardethoko]] || [[word:jajabardethoko|jajabardethoko]] || [[word:shashabardethoko|shashabardethoko]] || [[word:kakabardethoko|kakabardethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabardethoko|thabardethoko]] || [[word:jabardethoko|jabardethoko]] || [[word:shabardethoko|shabardethoko]] || [[word:kabardethoko|kabardethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabardethoko|thabardethoko]] || [[word:jabardethoko|jabardethoko]] || [[word:shabardethoko|shabardethoko]] || [[word:kabardethoko|kabardethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
